name: Crimson Tide
description: The Kragmore Clans fight with industrial might and sheer numbers. Nine missions of grinding, relentless conquest.

missions.name: The First Hammer
missions.briefing: A rival clan controls a rich Cordite deposit. Crush them.

missions.name: Iron Advance
missions.briefing: Bastion border fortifications block the advance. Bring them down.
missions.twist: Bastion has pre-built defence networks — use artillery to break them before advancing.

missions.name: Sky Resistance
missions.briefing: Valkyr air support is protecting Bastion positions. The sky must be cleared. Before committing heavy armour, use stealth Mole Rat sappers to destroy the anti-air positions the Valkyr aircraft are protecting.
objectives: Use Mole Rat sappers to destroy the Valkyr anti-air emplacements
missions.twist: Valkyr Overwatch Drones will detect Mole Rats the moment they fire — send in the sappers before Valkyr drones are deployed, or the tunnelling approach will fail.

missions.name: The Sea Route
missions.briefing: Naval routes offer a surprise flank around Bastion defences. Deploy Deep Bore stealth submarines ahead of the landing fleet to clear the way and deny Valkyr air cover a clear target.
objectives: Use Deep Bore submarines to clear the channel before the landing fleet moves
Land forces on the southern peninsula
missions.twist: Bastion Corvettes carry stealth-detection sonar — they will spot the Deep Bore submarines if they get too close. Sink the Corvettes from range before moving through the main channel.

missions.name: Ironmarch Rival
missions.briefing: Ironmarch is competing for the same resource deposits. They must be driven out before they can dig in. Lay Tremor Mines and send Mole Rat sappers ahead of the main force to destroy Ironmarch supply lines before they establish Signal Truck radar coverage.
objectives: Destroy Ironmarch Signal Trucks before they establish a detection network
missions.twist: Ironmarch Signal Trucks detect stealthed Mole Rats within their sensor range — destroy them first. Once the Signal Trucks are gone, Kragmore stealth assets move freely across the field.

missions.name: The Long Siege
missions.briefing: A massive Bastion citadel-city must fall. Mole Rat sappers will tunnel beneath the outer walls while artillery suppresses the defenders above — a two-pronged assault that Bastion's static detection network cannot cover simultaneously.
objectives: Send Mole Rat sappers to breach the outer walls from below
Breach the outer walls with siege artillery
missions.twist: Bastion Watcher towers and Patrol Rovers will detect Mole Rats the instant they surface — time the underground approach to coincide with the artillery barrage so Bastion's detectors are suppressed.

missions.name: Stormrend Ambush
missions.briefing: Stormrend has ambushed a Kragmore supply convoy. The ambushers must be hunted down. Stormrend Flicker Mines are invisible to Kragmore — advance slowly and sweep each sector before moving the convoy through.
objectives: Advance cautiously — Stormrend Flicker Mines are hidden along the route
missions.twist: Kragmore has no detector units — Stormrend Flicker Mines will only reveal themselves when triggered. Move Spotter units ahead of the convoy to absorb mine detonations before the main column advances.

missions.name: The Arcloft Network
missions.briefing: Arcloft's surveillance grid has exposed Kragmore movements to all enemies. Destroy it. Arcloft Vigilant jets detect everything — send Mole Rat sappers as the vanguard to take out Aether Relays before the main armoured column moves.
objectives: Deploy Mole Rat sappers to destroy the outermost Arcloft Aether Relays
Destroy all remaining Arcloft Aether Relays
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilant jets will detect the Mole Rat sappers the moment they fire — commit the main armoured column to cover their approach, forcing the Vigilants to engage the tanks rather than hunting the sappers.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: The Cordite Nexus — the largest deposit ever found. Kragmore tanks will crush any who stand in the way. Deep Bore submarines take the waterway while Mole Rats tunnel under the Nexus perimeter ahead of the main assault.
objectives: Use Mole Rats and Deep Bore submarines to breach the Nexus defences ahead of the main force
Be first to establish a Refinery on the Cordite Nexus
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilants and Bastion Patrol Rovers form a combined detection ring around the Nexus. The underground approach via Mole Rats is the only route the detection net cannot cover — but they must detonate before the main column arrives.
